parameters.toolDescription: List error records for a specific export or import step in a Celigo flow. Returns error messages, codes, timestamps, and retry data keys. Use flow_id and step_id from get_flow_error_counts.

step_id.description: The export or import step ID. Get from get_flow_error_counts.

_meta.description: Wave 0 prototype — simple single-API-call tool. Validates MCP Server Trigger → HTTP Request → Code → Respond pattern.
_meta.note_on_credentials: Create an n8n credential of type 'Header Auth' with Name='Authorization' and Value='Bearer YOUR_CELIGO_API_KEY'. Replace CELIGO_CREDENTIAL_ID with the actual credential ID.
_meta.note_on_errors_path: Celigo unified errors path is /flows/{flowId}/{stepId}/errors — no /exports/ or /imports/ prefix. Documented in plugins/celigo-integration/skills/celigo-integrator/references/errors.md
